name: Sectigo
description: Sectigo — commercial certificate authority offering SSL, code signing, and PKI management.

seo.title: Sectigo — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Sectigo: Sectigo — commercial certificate authority offering SSL, code signing, and PKI management.

when_to_use: OV and EV TLS certificate issuance for enterprise web apps
Code signing certificate for Windows software authenticity
PKI management via Sectigo Certificate Manager platform
S/MIME email signing certificates for secure communications
IoT device certificate lifecycle management via ACME API

pros: Covers TLS, code signing, S/MIME, IoT
cons: Automation and UX trail newer CAs
review.verdict: A reasonable mid-market commercial CA; fine for enterprise needs but not exciting.
review.best_for: Enterprises wanting an alternative to DigiCert at lower price points.
review.not_for: Teams who can standardize on free ACME-based CAs.
